title: Wilted Whisp Series
body:
A short series of ghostly flora called “Wilted Whisps” made in 2025. These were made in Assembly, and touched up in Procreate. 

![](/images/JPEG_SkullGhostFlowers_libertyjensen.etsy.com.JPG)

![](/images/JPG_GhostFlower_libertyjensen.etsy.com.JPG)![](/images/JPG_mush-BOOs.JPG)
